 {"id":"bd-24q.13.3","title":"Heat Stripe: Unit Tests (Bin Mapping + Dominance)","description":"Unit tests:
- Bin->pixel mapping: ensure first/last bins map to stripe bounds without gaps.
- Dominant bucket selection: tie-breaking is deterministic; intensity scaling is monotone.
- Representative commit selection per bin is stable.

Diagnostics
- Print bin summaries and selected mapping on failure.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:37.118670284Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:37.118670284Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.13.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:37.118670284Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.13.4","title":"Heat Stripe: E2E Tests (Tooltip + Jump)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Hover/tap stripe -> tooltip appears with expected fields.
- Click stripe segment -> commit idx changes and timeline selection reflects it.
- Mobile: long-press shows tooltip; single tap jumps (verify no conflict with scrub gesture).

Diagnostics
- Log stripe segment index, inferred bin range, and selected representative commit hash.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:41.530343068Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:41.530343068Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.13.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.13","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:41.530343068Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.14","title":"Viz: Commit Clustering by Similarity (MinHash + Themes)","description":"Goal
- Group commits by similarity of their changes so users can see recurring "themes" (e.g., lots of scrivening, refactors, alien-math additions) and jump between similar edits quickly.

UX (Desktop)
- Cluster panel: list clusters with size + representative commit; clicking a cluster highlights its members on the timeline and filters the commit list.
- Optional "theme tags" derived from dominant buckets / keywords in diffs.

UX (Mobile)
- Cluster list in a sheet; selecting highlights and offers "next/prev in cluster" navigation.

Implementation Notes (Alien-Artifact Leaning)
- Use MinHash signatures over token shingles of the unified diff (or added-lines-only) to approximate Jaccard similarity efficiently.
- Run in WebWorker; cache signatures/clusters by dataset hash + params (shingle size, signature length, threshold).
- Keep clustering deterministic (stable ordering) so permalinks remain meaningful.

Acceptance Criteria
- Clusters are stable and useful; selecting a cluster makes it easy to explore similar commits in a few clicks.

Testing
- Unit tests on synthetic diffs with known overlap; assert clustering groups correctly.
- E2E: select cluster, verify timeline highlights and next/prev navigation works.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:58.584087667Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:58.584087667Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:48:58.584087667Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.14.1","title":"Clustering: Compute MinHash Signatures (Worker)","description":"Implement MinHash signature generation:
- Token shingling on diff text (configurable: full diff vs added-lines-only; shingle size k).
- Deterministic hash functions seeded from dataset hash so results are stable.
- Signature length parameter (e.g., 64/128).
- Store signatures compactly (Uint32Array) and persist in localStorage (base64 or JSON-safe encoding).
- Provide progress + cancellation.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:04.282452496Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:04.282452496Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14.1","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.14","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:04.282452496Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.14.2","title":"Clustering: Deterministic Grouping (LSH/Threshold) + Theme Tags","description":"Cluster commits from MinHash signatures:
- Similarity estimate: signature agreement ratio -> approx Jaccard.
- Grouping strategy: deterministic threshold clustering (single-linkage) or LSH buckets; must be stable across runs.
- Theme tags: derive lightweight labels using dominant buckets + top keywords from added-lines (explainable).
- Output: clusters with stable IDs, representative commit (medoid), and member list.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:08.814823455Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:08.814823455Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.14","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:08.814823455Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.14.3","title":"Clustering: UI Panel + Timeline Highlight + Next/Prev Navigation","description":"Build the clustering UX:
- Cluster list with size, theme tags, and representative commit summary.
- Selecting a cluster highlights members on timeline/heat stripe and filters commit list; next/prev in cluster navigation buttons.
- URL state: selected cluster id and threshold params.
- Mobile: cluster list in sheet, with clear "next in cluster" CTA.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:13.178659379Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:13.178659379Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.14","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:13.178659379Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.14.4","title":"Clustering: Unit Tests (MinHash + Grouping Correctness)","description":"Unit tests:
- MinHash: synthetic sets with known Jaccard; assert estimator error within tolerance for chosen signature length.
- Determinism: same inputs produce same signatures/clusters (stable IDs).
- Grouping: synthetic diffs that should cluster together / apart; verify member sets.

Diagnostics
- Print signatures (first few hashes), similarity matrix slice, and resulting clusters on failure.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:17.838077213Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:17.838077213Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.14","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:17.838077213Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"bd-24q.14.5","title":"Clustering: E2E Tests (Select Cluster + Next/Prev)","description":"E2E scenarios:
- Open clustering panel; select top cluster -> timeline highlights appear and commit list filters.
- Use next/prev in cluster navigation; ensure selected commit remains within cluster membership.
- URL round-trip preserves selected cluster id + parameters.

Diagnostics
- Log selected cluster id, member count, and current commit hash after each navigation step.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:22.993879601Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:22.993879601Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.14.5","depends_on_id":"bd-24q.14","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:49:22.993879601Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.2","title":"Viz: Heading Mini-Map + Changed-Section Highlighting","description":"Add a left-side (desktop) / slide-over (mobile) heading mini-map generated from the rendered markdown, with per-commit indicators for which headings changed. Clicking a heading scrolls the doc pane; diff view can auto-scroll to first change under that heading.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.2","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.846093570Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.3","title":"Viz: Shareable Permalinks (URL State) + Copy Link","description":"Encode visualization state in the URL (commit idx, tab, resolution, metric, bucket filters). Add a Copy Link button. Deep links should load without needing any server logic.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.3","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.919682255Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-24q.4","title":"Viz: Story Mode (Curated Milestones + Autoplay)","description":"Add an optional narrative layer: curated milestones (hand-picked commits) with short annotations and an autoplay scrubber. Desktop: right-side timeline card; Mobile: full-screen swipeable cards.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["viz"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-24q.4","depends_on_id":"bd-24q","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-08T00:25:28.993920674Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
